aligned_lyrics.text: Static in the corner of the room
Me and this chipped blue mug
Cooling on the floor at two
All the shadows out of tune
I don’t need the words anyway
Just the way it made me sway
On a postcard I won’t send
Try to catch the rhyme and fail (ah)
It slips right off the rail
I don’t need the words anyway
Just the way it made me sway
Or some stranger on a train
In a town I never knew
In the crackle and the glow
I hear you in every note
But it still feels right (so right)
I don’t need the words anyway
Just the way it made me sway (yeah)
Just the way it made me sway
